body.title: Merge NetworkProxy into SystemProxy as network health facet
body.result: b546b5f3 — SystemProxy.network property wraps NetworkProxy singleton. 2 callers migrated. 2 tests.
body.description: NetworkProxy (network/proxy.py) becomes SystemProxy.network — per-host HTTP stats, latency percentiles, error rates. Same API, single owner. Callers import from SystemProxy instead of NetworkProxy directly.
